# nayatel_network (Resource)

Manages a Nayatel Cloud network.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# A private network with 1 Gbps bandwidth
resource "nayatel_network" "main" {
  bandwidth_limit = 1
}

output "subnet_cidr" {
  value = nayatel_network.main.subnet_cidr
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `bandwidth_limit` (Number) Bandwidth limit (1 = 25-250 Mbps). Default is 1.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Network identifier
- `monthly_cost` (Number) Estimated monthly cost in Rs. for the current billing cycle
- `name` (String) Name of the network
- `status` (String) Network status
- `subnet_cidr` (String) CIDR of the created subnet
- `subnet_id` (String) ID of the created subnet
## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
terraform import nayatel_network.main <network_id>
```
